raw_result:
{
  "extract_plan": {
    "section_map": [
      {"heading": "Implementing AI in Healthcare (Playbook context)", "location": "page banner / DIME PROJECT"},
      {"heading": "Health AI Readiness Assessment (title)", "location": "SECTION 1 | IDENTIFY THE PROBLEM"},
      {"heading": "Instructions", "location": "### Instructions"},
      {"heading": "Your responses will generate a personalized readiness report", "location": "report description block"},
      {"heading": "1. Leadership, governance & compliance", "location": "domain 1"},
      {"heading": "2. Data infrastructure & analytics", "location": "domain 2"},
      {"heading": "3. Technology, infrastructure & integration", "location": "domain 3"},
      {"heading": "4. Workforce development & change management", "location": "domain 4"},
      {"heading": "5. Clinical integration & implementation", "location": "domain 5"},
      {"heading": "6. Financial sustainability & ROI", "location": "domain 6"},
      {"heading": "7. Stakeholder & community engagement", "location": "domain 7"}
    ],
    "concept_inventory": [
      "Health AI readiness", "Health AI / AI in healthcare", "Self-assessment", "Personalized readiness report", "Health AI Maturity Model", "Seven readiness domains",
      "Leadership, governance & compliance", "Data infrastructure & analytics", "Technology, infrastructure & integration", "Workforce development & change management", "Clinical integration & implementation", "Financial sustainability & ROI", "Stakeholder & community engagement",
      "AI strategic plan", "AI governance committee", "Ethical and safety review of AI", "Enterprise-wide AI policy", "AI development and procurement", "Audits of high-risk AI systems", "Algorithmic fairness",
      "Centralized governed data repository", "Data governance program", "Data stewardship", "AI model performance and drift monitoring", "Automated data quality monitoring",
      "EHR integration via bidirectional APIs", "FHIR", "Scalable infrastructure (cloud/hybrid/edge)", "AI-specific security policies", "Sandbox / testing environment", "API management platform",
      "Change management process", "AI literacy and skills training", "Ongoing AI training / onboarding", "Clinical champions",
      "Clinician feedback process", "Clinical needs and workflow analysis", "Workflow embedding", "Co-design with clinicians",
      "AI capital and operational budgeting", "ROI framework / standardized impact methodology", "ROI reporting to leadership", "Reinvestment of AI-generated value",
      "Frontline clinician feedback loops", "Patient advisory council", "Patient / community co-design", "AI governance and ethics bodies"
    ]
  },
  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c_readiness", "name": "Health AI readiness", "aliases": ["AI readiness", "readiness to implement health AI"], "description": "An organization's current-state preparedness to implement health AI, assessed across seven domains.", "grounding_span": "readiness to implement health AI across the seven domains", "location": "title/intro"},
    {"id": "c_healthai", "name": "Health AI", "aliases": ["AI in healthcare", "health AI"], "description": "Artificial intelligence applied in healthcare settings.", "grounding_span": "Implementing AI in Healthcare", "location": "DIME PROJECT banner"},
    {"id": "c_selfassess", "name": "Self-assessment", "aliases": ["interactive self-assessment", "readiness assessment"], "description": "A structured, interactive self-review of organizational readiness.", "grounding_span": "This interactive self-assessment guides you through a structured review", "location": "intro"},
    {"id": "c_report", "name": "Personalized readiness report", "aliases": ["readiness report"], "description": "An output report evaluating current-state maturity, strengths, risk exposure, and a roadmap.", "grounding_span": "personalized readiness report", "location": "report block"},
    {"id": "c_domains", "name": "Seven readiness domains", "aliases": ["seven domains"], "description": "The seven domains of the Maturity Model across which readiness is assessed.", "grounding_span": "There are 4 questions for each of the 7 domains.", "location": "Instructions"},
    {"id": "d1", "name": "Leadership, governance & compliance", "aliases": [], "description": "Strategic alignment, ethical oversight, and policy guardrails to guide AI responsibly.", "grounding_span": "Does our organization have the strategic alignment, ethical oversight, and policy guardrails to guide AI responsibly?", "location": "domain 1"},
    {"id": "d2", "name": "Data infrastructure & analytics", "aliases": [], "description": "A data ecosystem ready to fuel and monitor AI reliably, scalably, and trustworthily.", "grounding_span": "Is our data ecosystem ready to fuel and monitor AI in a reliable, scalable, and trustworthy manner?", "location": "domain 2"},
    {"id": "d3", "name": "Technology, infrastructure & integration", "aliases": [], "description": "Technical infrastructure that can securely and seamlessly embed AI into core workflows at scale.", "grounding_span": "Can our technical infrastructure securely and seamlessly embed AI into core digital workflows at scale?", "location": "domain 3"},
    {"id": "d4", "name": "Workforce development & change management", "aliases": [], "description": "A workforce prepared, enabled, and supported to use AI safely and effectively.", "grounding_span": "Is our workforce prepared, enabled, and supported to use AI safely and effectively?", "location": "domain 4"},
    {"id": "d5", "name": "Clinical integration & implementation", "aliases": [], "description": "AI tools designed and deployed to genuinely help clinicians and fit their daily work.", "grounding_span": "Are our AI tools designed and deployed in a way that genuinely helps clinicians and fits into their daily work?", "location": "domain 5"},
    {"id": "d6", "name": "Financial sustainability & ROI", "aliases": [], "description": "AI investment that is financially disciplined, sustainable, and linked to measurable enterprise value.", "grounding_span": "Is our approach to AI investment financially disciplined, sustainable, and linked to measurable enterprise value?", "location": "domain 6"},
    {"id": "d7", "name": "Stakeholder & community engagement", "aliases": [], "description": "Treating patients, clinicians, and community members as genuine partners in shaping AI use.", "grounding_span": "Are patients, clinicians, and community members treated as genuine partners in shaping how we use AI?", "location": "domain 7"},
    {"id": "c_strategicplan", "name": "AI strategic plan", "aliases": [], "description": "A written AI strategic plan formally approved by board or executive leadership.", "grounding_span": "written AI strategic plan", "location": "domain 1 q1"},
    {"id": "c_govcommittee", "name": "AI governance committee", "aliases": ["governance committee"], "description": "A dedicated cross-functional governance committee with clinical representation reviewing AI initiatives.", "grounding_span": "dedicated, cross-functional governance committee (with clinical representation)", "location": "domain 1 q2"},
    {"id": "c_ethicsafety", "name": "Ethical and safety review of AI", "aliases": [], "description": "Formal review of AI initiatives for ethical and safety considerations.", "grounding_span": "reviews AI initiatives for ethical and safety considerations", "location": "domain 1 q2"},
    {"id": "c_enterprisepolicy", "name": "Enterprise-wide AI policy", "aliases": [], "description": "Approved enterprise-wide policy for AI development or procurement.", "grounding_span": "approved, enterprise-wide policy specific to the development or procurement of AI tools", "location": "domain 1 q3"},
    {"id": "c_audits", "name": "Audits of high-risk AI systems", "aliases": [], "description": "Regular audits of high-risk AI systems for performance, fairness, and policy compliance.", "grounding_span": "regular audits of high-risk AI systems to assess performance, fairness, and compliance with internal policies", "location": "domain 1 q4"},
    {"id": "c_repository", "name": "Centralized governed data repository", "aliases": ["data lake"], "description": "A centralized, governed repository (e.g., data lake, cloud) for key clinical and operational data.", "grounding_span": "centralized, governed repository (e.g., data lake, cloud)", "location": "domain 2 q1"},
    {"id": "c_datagov", "name": "Data governance program", "aliases": [], "description": "A formal data governance program with defined data stewardship roles for AI datasets.", "grounding_span": "formal data governance program with clearly defined data stewardship roles and responsibilities for AI datasets", "location": "domain 2 q2"},
    {"id": "c_driftmonitor", "name": "AI model performance and drift monitoring", "aliases": ["drift monitoring"], "description": "Automated dashboards monitoring accuracy and drift of deployed AI models in near real-time.", "grounding_span": "automated dashboards that monitor the performance (e.g., accuracy, drift) of your deployed AI models in near real-time", "location": "domain 2 q3"},
    {"id": "c_dataquality", "name": "Automated data quality monitoring", "aliases": [], "description": "Operational automated data quality monitoring and reporting for critical data feeds.", "grounding_span": "Automated data quality monitoring and reporting processes are operational for your critical data feeds.", "location": "domain 2 q4"},
    {"id": "c_ehrapi", "name": "EHR integration via bidirectional APIs", "aliases": ["EHR integration"], "description": "AI applications integrated with the EHR using standardized bidirectional APIs.", "grounding_span": "AI applications integrated with the EHR using standardized, bidirectional APIs (e.g., FHIR)", "location": "domain 3 q1"},
    {"id": "c_scalableinfra", "name": "Scalable infrastructure with AI security policies", "aliases": [], "description": "A defined scalable infrastructure (cloud, hybrid, edge) with AI-specific security policies.", "grounding_span": "defined, scalable infrastructure (e.g., cloud, hybrid, edge) with AI-specific security policies", "location": "domain 3 q2"},
    {"id": "c_sandbox", "name": "Sandbox / testing environment", "aliases": [], "description": "A dedicated testing or sandbox environment to deploy and validate AI tools before go-live.", "grounding_span": "dedicated testing or sandbox environment before go-live", "location": "domain 3 q3"},
    {"id": "c_apiplatform", "name": "API management platform", "aliases": [], "description": "A robust API management platform enabling scalable AI integration across systems.", "grounding_span": "robust API management platform or enterprise service business that facilitates scalable AI integration", "location": "domain 3 q4"},
    {"id": "c_changemgmt", "name": "Change management process", "aliases": [], "description": "A formal change management process required for major new AI initiatives.", "grounding_span": "formal change management process that is required for the implementation of major new AI initiatives", "location": "domain 4 q1"},
    {"id": "c_ailiteracy", "name": "AI literacy and skills training", "aliases": [], "description": "Role-based AI literacy and skills training for clinical, technical, and operational staff.", "grounding_span": "role-based AI literacy and skills training programs", "location": "domain 4 q2"},
    {"id": "c_ongoingtraining", "name": "Ongoing AI training / onboarding", "aliases": [], "description": "AI training integrated into professional development pathways or onboarding.", "grounding_span": "Ongoing AI training is integrated into professional development pathways or new employee onboarding", "location": "domain 4 q3"},
    {"id": "c_champions", "name": "Clinical champions", "aliases": [], "description": "Visible, respected clinical champions leading engagement and adoption of AI initiatives.", "grounding_span": "visible and respected clinical champions assigned to lead engagement and adoption", "location": "domain 4 q4"},
    {"id": "c_feedbackproc", "name": "Clinician feedback process", "aliases": [], "description": "A structured process for collecting and prioritizing clinician feedback to improve deployed AI tools.", "grounding_span": "structured process for collecting and prioritizing clinician feedback", "location": "domain 5 q1"},
    {"id": "c_needsanalysis", "name": "Clinical needs and workflow analysis", "aliases": [], "description": "AI use cases selected and prioritized based on documented clinical needs and workflow analysis.", "grounding_span": "formally selected and prioritized based on documented clinical needs and workflow analysis", "location": "domain 5 q2"},
    {"id": "c_workflowembed", "name": "Workflow embedding", "aliases": [], "description": "AI tools fully embedded within the primary clinical workflow (e.g., inside the EHR).", "grounding_span": "fully embedded within the primary workflow (e.g., inside the EHR)", "location": "domain 5 q3"},
    {"id": "c_codesignclin", "name": "Co-design with clinicians", "aliases": [], "description": "Co-designing AI tools and features with active, practicing clinicians.", "grounding_span": "co-designing AI tools and features with active, practicing clinicians", "location": "domain 5 q4"},
    {"id": "c_budgeting", "name": "AI capital and operational budgeting", "aliases": [], "description": "AI initiatives formally included in the annual capital and operational budgeting process.", "grounding_span": "annual capital and operational budgeting process", "location": "domain 6 q1"},
    {"id": "c_roiframework", "name": "ROI framework / standardized impact methodology", "aliases": ["ROI framework"], "description": "A standardized methodology to track financial, clinical, and operational impact of AI initiatives.", "grounding_span": "standardized methodology (e.g., dashboard, ROI framework) to track the financial, clinical, and operational impact", "location": "domain 6 q2"},
    {"id": "c_roireport", "name": "ROI reporting to leadership", "aliases": [], "description": "ROI and performance outcomes of AI investments regularly reported to and reviewed by a leadership committee.", "grounding_span": "ROI and performance outcomes of your AI investments are regularly reported to and reviewed by a leadership committee", "location": "domain 6 q3"},
    {"id": "c_reinvest", "name": "Reinvestment of AI-generated value", "aliases": [], "description": "A documented process for reinvesting savings or value from successful AI initiatives into further innovation.", "grounding_span": "documented process for reinvesting savings or value generated by successful AI initiatives", "location": "domain 6 q4"},
    {"id": "c_feedbackloops", "name": "Frontline clinician feedback loops", "aliases": [], "description": "Formal feedback loops (working groups, advisory councils) including frontline clinicians in AI tool design and selection.", "grounding_span": "formal feedback loops (e.g., working groups, advisory councils) that include frontline clinicians", "location": "domain 7 q1"},
    {"id": "c_patientcouncil", "name": "Patient advisory council", "aliases": [], "description": "A patient advisory council or similar body consulted on AI initiatives affecting patient care.", "grounding_span": "patient advisory council or a similar body that is consulted on AI initiatives", "location": "domain 7 q2"},
    {"id": "c_patientcodesign", "name": "Patient / community co-design", "aliases": [], "description": "Patients, caregivers, or community members systematically involved in co-design or testing of AI tools for usability and fairness.", "grounding_span": "systematically involved in the co-design or testing of your AI tools for usability and fairness", "location": "domain 7 q3"},
    {"id": "c_ethicsbodies", "name": "AI governance and ethics bodies", "aliases": [], "description": "Patients and community representatives as active partners on AI governance or ethics bodies.", "grounding_span": "active partners on your AI governance or ethics bodies", "location": "domain 7 q4"}
  ],
  "definitions": [],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl1", "claim_text": "There are 4 questions for each of the 7 domains.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "There are 4 questions for each of the 7 domains.", "location": "Instructions"},
    {"id": "cl2", "claim_text": "The assessment takes approximately 10 minutes.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Approximate time: 10 minutes", "location": "title block"},
    {"id": "cl3", "claim_text": "The report delivers a targeted roadmap with the specific benchmarks needed to advance to the next level.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "a targeted roadmap with the specific benchmarks you need to meet to advance to the next level", "location": "report block"},
    {"id": "cl4", "claim_text": "The self-assessment reviews organizational readiness to implement health AI across the seven domains of the Maturity Model.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "structured review of your organization", "location": "intro"}
  ],
  "instruments": [
    {"id": "inst1", "name": "Health AI Readiness Assessment", "owner": "Digital Medicine Society (DiMe)", "year": "2025", "method": "Interactive binary (Yes/No) self-assessment checklist across seven domains, four questions per domain", "grounding_span": "Health AI Readiness Assessment", "location": "title"}
  ],
  "measures": [
    {"id": "m1", "text": "Your board or executive leadership formally approved a written AI strategic plan.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Your board or executive leadership formally approved a written AI strategic plan.", "location": "domain 1 q1"},
    {"id": "m2", "text": "There is a dedicated, cross-functional governance committee (with clinical representation) that formally reviews AI initiatives for ethical and safety considerations.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "There is a dedicated, cross-functional governance committee (with clinical representation) that formally reviews AI initiatives for ethical and safety considerations.", "location": "domain 1 q2"},
    {"id": "m3", "text": "Your organization has an approved, enterprise-wide policy specific to the development or procurement of AI tools.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Your organization has an approved, enterprise-wide policy specific to the development or procurement of AI tools.", "location": "domain 1 q3"},
    {"id": "m4", "text": "You conduct regular audits of high-risk AI systems to assess performance, fairness, and compliance with internal policies.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You conduct regular audits of high-risk AI systems to assess performance, fairness, and compliance with internal policies.", "location": "domain 1 q4"},
    {"id": "m5", "text": "The majority (>60%) of your key clinical and operational data sources for AI integrated into a centralized, governed repository (e.g., data lake, cloud).", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "The majority (>60%) of your key clinical and operational data sources for AI integrated into a centralized, governed repository (e.g., data lake, cloud).", "location": "domain 2 q1"},
    {"id": "m6", "text": "You have a formal data governance program with clearly defined data stewardship roles and responsibilities for AI datasets.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have a formal data governance program with clearly defined data stewardship roles and responsibilities for AI datasets.", "location": "domain 2 q2"},
    {"id": "m7", "text": "You have automated dashboards that monitor the performance (e.g., accuracy, drift) of your deployed AI models in near real-time.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have automated dashboards that monitor the performance (e.g., accuracy, drift) of your deployed AI models in near real-time.", "location": "domain 2 q3"},
    {"id": "m8", "text": "Automated data quality monitoring and reporting processes are operational for your critical data feeds.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Automated data quality monitoring and reporting processes are operational for your critical data feeds.", "location": "domain 2 q4"},
    {"id": "m9", "text": "Your AI applications integrated with the EHR using standardized, bidirectional APIs (e.g., FHIR).", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Your AI applications integrated with the EHR using standardized, bidirectional APIs (e.g., FHIR).", "location": "domain 3 q1"},
    {"id": "m10", "text": "You have a defined, scalable infrastructure (e.g., cloud, hybrid, edge) with AI-specific security policies in place.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have a defined, scalable infrastructure (e.g., cloud, hybrid, edge) with AI-specific security policies in place.", "location": "domain 3 q2"},
    {"id": "m11", "text": "Your organization can reliably deploy and validate new AI tools in a dedicated testing or sandbox environment before go-live.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Your organization can reliably deploy and validate new AI tools in a dedicated testing or sandbox environment before go-live.", "location": "domain 3 q3"},
    {"id": "m12", "text": "There is a robust API management platform or enterprise service business that facilitates scalable AI integration across multiple systems.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "There is a robust API management platform or enterprise service business that facilitates scalable AI integration across multiple systems.", "location": "domain 3 q4"},
    {"id": "m13", "text": "Your organization has a formal change management process that is required for the implementation of major new AI initiatives.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Your organization has a formal change management process that is required for the implementation of major new AI initiatives.", "location": "domain 4 q1"},
    {"id": "m14", "text": "You have implemented role-based AI literacy and skills training programs for relevant clinical, technical, and operational staff.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have implemented role-based AI literacy and skills training programs for relevant clinical, technical, and operational staff.", "location": "domain 4 q2"},
    {"id": "m15", "text": "Ongoing AI training is integrated into professional development pathways or new employee onboarding for relevant roles.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Ongoing AI training is integrated into professional development pathways or new employee onboarding for relevant roles.", "location": "domain 4 q3"},
    {"id": "m16", "text": "There are visible and respected clinical champions assigned to lead engagement and adoption for your key AI initiatives.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "There are visible and respected clinical champions assigned to lead engagement and adoption for your key AI initiatives.", "location": "domain 4 q4"},
    {"id": "m17", "text": "You have a structured process for collecting and prioritizing clinician feedback to drive iterative improvements for deployed AI tools.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have a structured process for collecting and prioritizing clinician feedback to drive iterative improvements for deployed AI tools.", "location": "domain 5 q1"},
    {"id": "m18", "text": "Your AI use cases are formally selected and prioritized based on documented clinical needs and workflow analysis.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Your AI use cases are formally selected and prioritized based on documented clinical needs and workflow analysis.", "location": "domain 5 q2"},
    {"id": "m19", "text": "Your deployed AI tools are fully embedded within the primary workflow (e.g., inside the EHR).", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Your deployed AI tools are fully embedded within the primary workflow (e.g., inside the EHR).", "location": "domain 5 q3"},
    {"id": "m20", "text": "You have a process for co-designing AI tools and features with active, practicing clinicians.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have a process for co-designing AI tools and features with active, practicing clinicians.", "location": "domain 5 q4"},
    {"id": "m21", "text": "AI initiatives are formally included in your organization's annual capital and operational budgeting process.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "AI initiatives are formally included in your organization's annual capital and operational budgeting process.", "location": "domain 6 q1"},
    {"id": "m22", "text": "You use a standardized methodology (e.g., dashboard, ROI framework) to track the financial, clinical, and operational impact of your key AI initiatives.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You use a standardized methodology (e.g., dashboard, ROI framework) to track the financial, clinical, and operational impact of your key AI initiatives.", "location": "domain 6 q2"},
    {"id": "m23", "text": "The ROI and performance outcomes of your AI investments are regularly reported to and reviewed by a leadership committee.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "The ROI and performance outcomes of your AI investments are regularly reported to and reviewed by a leadership committee.", "location": "domain 6 q3"},
    {"id": "m24", "text": "You have a documented process for reinvesting savings or value generated by successful AI initiatives back into further innovation.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have a documented process for reinvesting savings or value generated by successful AI initiatives back into further innovation.", "location": "domain 6 q4"},
    {"id": "m25", "text": "You have formal feedback loops (e.g., working groups, advisory councils) that include frontline clinicians in the design and selection of AI tools.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have formal feedback loops (e.g., working groups, advisory councils) that include frontline clinicians in the design and selection of AI tools.", "location": "domain 7 q1"},
    {"id": "m26", "text": "You have a patient advisory council or a similar body that is consulted on AI initiatives that directly impact patient care or experience.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "You have a patient advisory council or a similar body that is consulted on AI initiatives that directly impact patient care or experience.", "location": "domain 7 q2"},
    {"id": "m27", "text": "Patients, caregivers, or community members are systematically involved in the co-design or testing of your AI tools for usability and fairness.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Patients, caregivers, or community members are systematically involved in the co-design or testing of your AI tools for usability and fairness.", "location": "domain 7 q3"},
    {"id": "m28", "text": "Patients and community representatives are active partners on your AI governance or ethics bodies.", "response_type": "Yes/No", "grounding_span": "Patients and community representatives are active partners on your AI governance or ethics bodies.", "location": "domain 7 q4"}
  ],
  "standards": [
    {"id": "std1", "name": "FHIR", "version": null, "steward": null, "as_of_date": null, "grounding_span": "standardized, bidirectional APIs (e.g., FHIR)", "location": "domain 3 q1"}
  ],

    {"id": "fw1", "name": "Health AI Maturity Model", "owner": "Digital Medicine Society (DiMe)", "year": null, "grounding_span": "Health AI Maturity Model", "location": "playbook nav / intro"}
  ],

    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m1", "grounding_span": "Your board or executive leadership formally approved a written AI strategic plan.", "location": "domain 1 q1"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m2", "grounding_span": "There is a dedicated, cross-functional governance committee (with clinical representation) that formally reviews AI initiatives for ethical and safety considerations.", "location": "domain 1 q2"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m3", "grounding_span": "Your organization has an approved, enterprise-wide policy specific to the development or procurement of AI tools.", "location": "domain 1 q3"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m4", "grounding_span": "You conduct regular audits of high-risk AI systems to assess performance, fairness, and compliance with internal policies.", "location": "domain 1 q4"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m5", "grounding_span": "The majority (>60%) of your key clinical and operational data sources for AI integrated into a centralized, governed repository (e.g., data lake, cloud).", "location": "domain 2 q1"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m6", "grounding_span": "You have a formal data governance program with clearly defined data stewardship roles and responsibilities for AI datasets.", "location": "domain 2 q2"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m7", "grounding_span": "You have automated dashboards that monitor the performance (e.g., accuracy, drift) of your deployed AI models in near real-time.", "location": "domain 2 q3"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m8", "grounding_span": "Automated data quality monitoring and reporting processes are operational for your critical data feeds.", "location": "domain 2 q4"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m9", "grounding_span": "Your AI applications integrated with the EHR using standardized, bidirectional APIs (e.g., FHIR).", "location": "domain 3 q1"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m10", "grounding_span": "You have a defined, scalable infrastructure (e.g., cloud, hybrid, edge) with AI-specific security policies in place.", "location": "domain 3 q2"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m11", "grounding_span": "Your organization can reliably deploy and validate new AI tools in a dedicated testing or sandbox environment before go-live.", "location": "domain 3 q3"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m12", "grounding_span": "There is a robust API management platform or enterprise service business that facilitates scalable AI integration across multiple systems.", "location": "domain 3 q4"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m13", "grounding_span": "Your organization has a formal change management process that is required for the implementation of major new AI initiatives.", "location": "domain 4 q1"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m14", "grounding_span": "You have implemented role-based AI literacy and skills training programs for relevant clinical, technical, and operational staff.", "location": "domain 4 q2"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m15", "grounding_span": "Ongoing AI training is integrated into professional development pathways or new employee onboarding for relevant roles.", "location": "domain 4 q3"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m16", "grounding_span": "There are visible and respected clinical champions assigned to lead engagement and adoption for your key AI initiatives.", "location": "domain 4 q4"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m17", "grounding_span": "You have a structured process for collecting and prioritizing clinician feedback to drive iterative improvements for deployed AI tools.", "location": "domain 5 q1"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m18", "grounding_span": "Your AI use cases are formally selected and prioritized based on documented clinical needs and workflow analysis.", "location": "domain 5 q2"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m19", "grounding_span": "Your deployed AI tools are fully embedded within the primary workflow (e.g., inside the EHR).", "location": "domain 5 q3"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m20", "grounding_span": "You have a process for co-designing AI tools and features with active, practicing clinicians.", "location": "domain 5 q4"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m21", "grounding_span": "AI initiatives are formally included in your organization's annual capital and operational budgeting process.", "location": "domain 6 q1"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m22", "grounding_span": "You use a standardized methodology (e.g., dashboard, ROI framework) to track the financial, clinical, and operational impact of your key AI initiatives.", "location": "domain 6 q2"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m23", "grounding_span": "The ROI and performance outcomes of your AI investments are regularly reported to and reviewed by a leadership committee.", "location": "domain 6 q3"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m24", "grounding_span": "You have a documented process for reinvesting savings or value generated by successful AI initiatives back into further innovation.", "location": "domain 6 q4"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m25", "grounding_span": "You have formal feedback loops (e.g., working groups, advisory councils) that include frontline clinicians in the design and selection of AI tools.", "location": "domain 7 q1"},
    {"type": "uses_measure", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "m26", "grounding_span": "You have a patient advisory council or a similar body that is consulted on AI initiatives that directly impact patient care or experience.", "location": "domain 7 q2"},

  "proposed_relationships": [
    {"grounding_span": "This interactive self-assessment guides you through a structured review of your organization", "suggested_edge": "instrument_based_on_framework", "note": "The Health AI Readiness Assessment (Instrument) is derived from / structured around the Health AI Maturity Model (Framework) and its seven domains; no Instrument→Framework edge type exists in the schema.", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "fw1", "location": "intro"},
    {"grounding_span": "a targeted roadmap with the specific benchmarks you need to meet to advance to the next level", "suggested_edge": "instrument_produces_output", "note": "The Instrument generates a personalized readiness report (Concept output); no Instrument→Concept 'produces' edge exists.", "from_id": "inst1", "to_id": "c_report", "location": "report block"},
    {"grounding_span": "Deliver** a targeted roadmap with the specific benchmarks you need to meet to advance to the next level.", "suggested_edge": "framework_has_maturity_levels", "note": "The Maturity Model implies ordered maturity levels ('advance to the next level'); the schema has no way to represent ordinal level structure within a framework.", "from_id": "fw1", "to_id": "c_report", "location": "report block"}
  ]
